text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I said I'd win it this time—that today would be the
day. I made sure to prepare myself, and even my
predictions were in my favor...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urghhh! What am I supposed to do now?!
choice_data_list: Don't get flustered. Just keep on keeping on.
When times get tough, turn to divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That sounded just like one of the
revelations from my fortune slips!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thinking about it that way, perhaps you're my fortune slip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, oh thank you! Please continue to
guide me with your precious teachings!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And please accept this as a token of my
appreciation! It's a charm that prevents you from
stubbing your pinkie toe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If nothing else, it looks like she's back to her
cheery self.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I can't believe I lost sight of not only myself, but the very essence of divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The eye to my soul has awoken! Beep, beep! Let's
get to predicting right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The angle of my ears alludes to the phrase, "Where there's a will, there's a way"! Then I will do... some training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of respect for Matikanefukukitaru's
determination, I add some extra laps to her
current training regimen.
